description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a distinctive, elongated barrel and a classic, angular frame reminiscent of early 20th-century European pistols. The grip is dark brown with a textured, checkered pattern, providing both visual contrast and ergonomic handling. The frame and slide are finished in a matte black, with subtle mechanical details such as the trigger, trigger guard, and safety lever visible. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending well beyond the frame, and the overall silhouette is slim and streamlined. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated smoothly into the lower frame, while the magazine base is slightly beveled and flush with the grip. No visible engravings or markings are present on the slide or barrel, giving the handgun a clean, utilitarian appearance.
description: A classic, black semi-automatic handgun with a long barrel and a textured brown grip, featuring a streamlined, angular frame and minimal external markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the checkered brown grip, and the angular frame details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, barrel length, and mechanical details on the frame.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, the slide, and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is dark brown with a pronounced checkered texture, providing a secure and tactile surface for handling. It is slightly contoured to fit the palm, with a subtle flare at the base for improved ergonomics. The material appears to be a dense wood or polymer, and there are no visible logos, finger grooves, or embellishments, giving it a classic, utilitarian look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, smoothly integrated into the lower frame. It has a traditional, oval shape with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, without integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long, cylindrical, and unadorned, with a smooth matte black finish. It does not appear to be threaded, ported, or fluted, and there are no visible compensators or external features. The profile is classic and streamlined, extending well beyond the frame.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unmarked, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip, featuring a slightly beveled edge for a seamless fit. It is flat and lacks any finger rests, logos, or texturing, maintaining a minimalist and unobtrusive appearance.
